name: paper-heuristic-system
description: A reusable Codex skill and CLI for iterative paper revision, citation verification, novelty risk mapping, and project-local Paper-HS state management.

interface.shortDescription: Iterative paper revision with citation and novelty guardrails.
interface.longDescription: Maintain a manuscript as a Paper-Heuristic System: claim graph, evidence ledger, source cards, novelty map, citation verification, revision trials, regression checks, memory compression, and meta-skill optimization.
defaultPrompt: Use paper_heuristic_system to ingest this paper and audit citations before revising.
Use paper_heuristic_system to check whether this idea is novel enough and whether the claims are submission-ready.
Use paper_heuristic_system to revise this manuscript with source-card and BibTeX verification.
